name: @prism3/plugin
description: Prism3 Figma plugin (docs/18, docs/22). Two contexts: a main-thread controller that writes/reads figma.variables, and the shared web UI in the iframe. #107 scaffold (manifest + two-context split + typed bridge); #108 write adapter (WritePlan → live figma.variables); #109 read adapter (readFigmaVariables → ReadbackSnapshot + verifyReadback); the shared-UI bundle (#110) lands later.

scripts.test: npx tsx test-write.ts && npx tsx test-readback.ts && npx tsx test-persist.ts && npx tsx test-write-float.ts
